title: 55573362 Turbine System Turbo Boost Control Solenoid Valve, Replacement for Vauxhall Zafira 2005-2011, Replaces 55558101 55563534 5851073 5851600
features: Fitment: Replacement for Vauxhall Zafira 2005-2011, Replacement for Vauxhall Meriva 2003-2009, Replacement for Opel Zafira B 2005-2011, Replacement for Opel Insignia Sports Tourer 2008-2015, more models are available in the product descriptions below
Endurance Property: This solenoid valve is manufactured using robust materials and has good corrosion resistance and high temperature resistance, enabling it to operate stably in extreme environments

Improved Fuel Efficiency: By optimizing turbocharger control, this solenoid valve helps improve engine fuel efficiency. Better airflow management not only improves power output but also reduces fuel consumption
Easy Installation: The solenoid valve has a simple design and an intuitive installation process, making it suitable for DIY enthusiasts and professional technicians, saving time and energy
description: Product Description Turbo Boost Control Solenoid Valve Turbo Boost Control Solenoid Valve Package Includes: 1 x Turbo Boost Control Solenoid Valve Versatile Compatibility Single Port Design JUUDDENPARTS Turbo Boost Control Solenoid Valve Reliable, Efficient, and Easy to Install Enhance your vehicle's performance with the JUUDDENPARTS 55573362 Turbo Boost Control Solenoid Valve. Made from robust materials for corrosion and heat resistance, it improves turbocharger control for improved fuel efficiency. Easy to install, it's ideal for DIYers and pros alike. Robust Construction Enhanced Fuel Efficiency Easy Installation Fitment: Fitment: Replacement for Vauxhall Zafira 2005-2011 Replacement for Vauxhall Meriva 2003-2009 Replacement for Vauxhall Insignia Sports Tourer 2008-2015 Replacement for Vauxhall Insignia 2008-2015 Replacement for Vauxhall Corsa 2006-2014 Replacement for Vauxhall Cascada 2013-2015 Fitment: Replacement for Vauxhall Astravan 2005-2010 Replacement for Vauxhall Astra Twintop 2006-2010 Replacement for Vauxhall Astra 2004-2015 Replacement for Opel Zafira B 2005-2011 Replacement for Opel Meriva 2005-2010 Replacement for Opel Insignia Sports Tourer 2008-2015 Fitment: Replacement for Opel Insignia 2008-2015 Replacement for Opel Corsa 2006-2007 Replacement for Opel Cascada 2013-2015 Replacement for Opel Astra J 2009-2015 Replacement for Opel Astra H Sport Hatch 2005-2009 Replacement for Opel Astra H 2004-2009 Specification Information Product Name: Turbo Boost Control Solenoid Valve Fitment: Replacement for Malibu 2012-205 Replace Part Number: 5851600, 55573362, 1058510073, 700527010 Replace Part Number: 55558101, 5851073, 55563534 Precautions for use Safety Check: Before installation, ensure the vehicle is turned off and the battery is disconnected to avoid electrical short circuits or other safety hazards. Proper Connection: Ensure correct connection of the inlet and outlet during installation to prevent leaks or performance issues. Regular Maintenance: Periodically inspect the valve and its connecting components for signs of corrosion or wear to maintain performance. Avoid Overloading: Ensure that the valve is not operated beyond its rated working range to prevent failure or damage. Seek Professional Help: If you encounter any issues during installation or operation, it is advisable to contact a professional technician for inspection and repair.
